# Requirement Quality Checklist: Website Improvements (Multi-Perspective)

**Purpose**: Validate that requirements in the spec are complete, unambiguous, consistent, and measurable. Focus on the quality of what is specified (completeness, clarity, consistency, coverage, edge cases), not implementation behavior.  
**Created**: 2026-02-28  
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Is at least one concrete credibility signal type (e.g. previous role, thing built, current initiative) explicitly required in the hero, or is the requirement left open to any single signal? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 Are "major homepage sections" enumerated so that FR-002 (heading + summary per section) can be verified for each? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK003 Is the set of content that MUST live on the About page (headshot, background, social links) explicitly listed and sufficient to satisfy User Story 1? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, User Story 1]
- [ ] CHK004 Is the source or format for theme descriptors specified (e.g. config file, frontmatter) so FR-004 is implementable? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK005 Are requirements defined for which "critical routes" receive performance and automation checks, or is the list left to implementation? [Completeness, Spec §FR-013, FR-019, Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK006 Are the exact LCP and CLS threshold values (e.g. 2.5s, 0.1) specified in the spec or only by example? [Completeness, Spec §FR-013, User Story 5]
- [ ] CHK007 Is "visible without scrolling" for newsletter signup on the writing index defined with a concrete viewport or fold criterion? [Clarity, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK008 Are requirements specified for how automated a11y and metadata checks are triggered (CI, pre-commit) and what "failures reported clearly" means? [Completeness, Spec §FR-019, Assumptions]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK009 Is "brief summary or subheading" per section quantified (e.g. one line, word limit) or left to interpretation? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK010 Is "visible focus indicator" for header elements defined with at least one measurable attribute (e.g. visible ring, contrast)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK011 Is "filter or group projects by at least one dimension" explicitly tied to existing frontmatter (type, status) or could it be a new dimension? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK012 Is "relevant results" for on-site search defined (e.g. match on title/theme/tags, ranking or order)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012]
- [ ] CHK013 Is "noticeable layout shift" for fonts and above-the-fold content defined (e.g. CLS threshold or qualitative criterion)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-014]
- [ ] CHK014 Is "prominent" for the Contact destination defined with placement or visibility criteria? [Clarity, Spec §FR-017]
- [ ] CHK015 Is "confirmation that dismisses or times out" for share/copy specified with duration or behavior (e.g. within 5 seconds)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-018, SC-008]
- [ ] CHK016 Is "single source" for default metadata (site name, default preview image) specified as a named artifact or module so implementers know where to centralize? [Clarity, Spec §FR-020]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK017 Are live region and label requirements for the newsletter form consistent with those for the contact form (same level of specificity)? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005, FR-006]
- [ ] CHK018 Are preview image requirements (default vs article-specific) consistent between FR-010 and the Edge Cases (image optimization unavailable)? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK019 Do performance targets (FR-013, FR-014) align with success criterion SC-006 and the plan's "LCP ≤ 2.5s, CLS ≤ 0.1"? [Consistency, Spec §FR-013, SC-006, Plan]
- [ ] CHK020 Are "Subscribe via RSS" placement (writing index or footer) and "near the newsletter CTA" consistent and unambiguous? [Consistency, Spec §FR-016]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK021 Can SC-001 ("15-second scan" and "one concrete credibility signal") be verified without implementation details (e.g. by a reviewer or script)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK022 Can SC-002 (screen reader completion of signup and contact, understanding messages) be objectively tested (e.g. with defined assistive tech and steps)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002]
- [ ] CHK023 Is "under three actions" for on-site search (SC-005) defined (e.g. open search, type, select) so it is measurable? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK024 Can SC-009 (build/CI fails or warns on a11y, metadata, or link validation) be verified by a single run without ambiguity on what "warns" means? [Measurability, Spec §SC-009]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK025 Are requirements defined for the alternate flow when a visitor clears the project filter (FR-009 acceptance scenario 3)? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3]
- [ ] CHK026 Are requirements specified for the exception flow when newsletter or contact submission fails (server/rate limit) beyond "user-friendly error message and can retry"? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK027 Are requirements defined for the zero-results scenario for on-site search (message and optional suggestions) in the spec body, not only in Edge Cases? [Coverage, Spec §FR-012, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK028 Is the recovery or fallback when automated a11y or metadata checks are not yet implemented (e.g. manual gate) addressed in requirements or assumptions? [Coverage, Spec §FR-019]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK029 Is the edge case "writing has no related posts" explicitly required as "Read Next section hidden" in a functional requirement, not only in Edge Cases narrative? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-018, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK030 Is "no stored theme preference" (system preference, no flash) specified as a requirement with testable outcome? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK031 Is the project filter zero-results state ("No projects match" and way to clear) required in a testable FR or only described in Edge Cases? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK032 Is "image optimization not available from host" (images still served, targets met where possible) reflected in a requirement or assumption so implementation can defer optimization? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-013, Edge Cases]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK033 Is the dependency on spec 002 (persona improvements) explicitly scoped (e.g. which US/FR from 002 are prerequisite)? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK034 Is the assumption "critical routes include at least homepage, About, writing index, one writing page, projects index" stated in the spec so automation scope is clear? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK035 Is the assumption that "hosting environment may or may not support image optimization" documented so FR-013 conditional is unambiguous? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- These items validate the quality of requirements as written; they do not verify that the site implements them correctly.
- Each `/speckit.checklist` run can create additional checklist files (e.g. domain-specific); this file focuses on cross-cutting requirement quality for 003.
